raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution framing above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Strengthening the artifact requires checking whether the argument from judge length bias to debiased ranking follows coherently.","R1.3":"The empirical claims about correlations, coefficient stability, and leaderboard changes must align with the reported evidence for the passage to be stronger.","R1.6":"The delegation naturally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and academic register.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty around claims not fully established by the artifact.","RX.2":"The strengthening should avoid inflating claims beyond what the reported results support.","RX.3":"The task is limited to projecting responsibilities and must not execute edits or critique the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims or harmful overstatement.","RX.5":"The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution framing above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the artifact requires checking whether the argument from judge length bias to debiased ranking follows coherently.
rationale.R1.3: The empirical claims about correlations, coefficient stability, and leaderboard changes must align with the reported evidence for the passage to be stronger.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation naturally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty around claims not fully established by the artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The strengthening should avoid inflating claims beyond what the reported results support.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to projecting responsibilities and must not execute edits or critique the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific claims or harmful overstatement.
rationale.RX.5: The responsibility assignment should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and artifact.
